title: hordeum patulum
intro: Hordeum patulum, also known as wild barley or desert barley, is a plant species belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Hordeum patulum can be prepared as tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants, to create tonics and supplements.
